untranslatable_reason: This is a cross-sectional ranking strategy requiring decile formation (top 10% vs bottom 10% by historical returns across the universe). Standard technical indicators cannot express portfolio-level ranking and rebalancing logic. The signal requires: (1) universe-wide ranking by past returns, (2) portfolio construction (long decile P1, short decile P10), and (3) periodic rebalancing—all of which are portfolio/factor construction operations, not bar-by-bar conditions. A backtest engine would need custom portfolio ranking logic to implement this momentum factor properly.
translation_notes: SSRN_299107_5 is a classic Fama-French momentum factor (winner-loser spread). It cannot be meaningfully translated to technical indicator conditions on individual bars. Implementation requires: (a) historical return ranking over a ranking period, (b) decile classification, (c) long/short portfolio construction, (d) hold through measurement period, (e) rebalance on new ranking. This is a fundamental portfolio strategy, not a price-action signal.
